commands: export HOME=/root && git config --global --add safe.directory /opt/pedagolens && cd /opt/pedagolens && git pull origin main 2>&1

php -r "define('ABSPATH','/var/www/html/'); require_once('/var/www/html/wp-load.php'); \$r = get_role('pedagolens_teacher'); if(\$r){ foreach(['edit_posts','publish_posts','delete_posts','upload_files','edit_pl_courses','publish_pl_courses','read_pl_analyses','manage_pl_workbench'] as \$c){ \$r->add_cap(\$c); } echo 'Teacher caps updated: ' . implode(', ', array_keys(array_filter(\$r->capabilities))); } else { echo 'Role not found'; }" 2>&1
systemctl restart apache2 && echo 'Apache restarted OK'
